_metadata.name: Subdomain Takeover Triage
_metadata.description: Authorized bug bounty workflow that discovers subdomains, checks DNS and HTTP takeover indicators, runs safe takeover templates, and writes a prioritized candidate report.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Subdomain Takeover Triage
manifest.description: Find and prioritize possible subdomain takeover candidates from authorized domains and imported known subdomains.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: Subdomain Takeover Triage
graph.description: Authorized takeover candidate triage workflow for bug bounty targets.

runtimeInputs.label: In-scope root domains
runtimeInputs.description: Root domains approved by the bug bounty program.

runtimeInputs.label: Known subdomains
runtimeInputs.description: Optional in-scope hostnames from prior recon or imports.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorization notes
runtimeInputs.description: Program scope, exclusions, and rate-limit notes.
